name: Shell plc
description: Shell plc is a prominent British multinational energy and petrochemical company headquartered in London. As one of the world's largest oil and gas enterprises, it operates across the entire energy spectrum, including integrated gas, upstream exploration, and the marketing of chemicals and refined products. The company is actively transitioning toward a lower-carbon future by investing in renewables and energy solutions. With a global presence spanning over 70 countries, Shell plays a critical role in meeting the world's growing energy demands while focusing on innovation and sustainable development within the global energy sector.
